Cyber Arm.name: Cyber Arm
Cyber Arm.description: A cybernetic arm providing bonuses to melee, brawling, lift, and strength damage

Cyber Eye.name: Cyber Eye
Cyber Eye.description: Adds +1D to perception and +1D to ranged attack rolls.

Reflex Enhancer.name: Reflex Enhancer
Reflex Enhancer.description: Provides a 1D bonus to dodge and initiative
